productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Check Maroon Jacket
description: Composition Maroon and black sleeveless puffer jacket with the shell made of 100% cotton and lining made of 100% polyester, has a mock neck, zippered front placket, and two pockets on either sides Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, iron or wring Dry in shade This cotton puffer jacket from united colors of benetton is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with jeans and a bright tee, or wear unzipped with a monochrome tee and form fitting jeans. Ankle high boots look best with this piece. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
